title: Verifying Rust cryptography in SymCrypt, from standards to code
summary:
Cryptographic code supports vital protections in modern computing systems. Learn how a new method helps verify code as developers write it while preserving speed and adaptability as it gets implemented and evolves.

title: Empowering India’s next generation of innovators with ATL Saathi
summary: Google and AIM launched ATL Saathi, a Gemini-powered AI tool empowering Indian educators in robotics labs.
